Metadata.title: Next.js App Template
Metadata.description: A full-stack Next.js starter template — ready for anything.

Nav.signInDisabled: Configure Stack Auth to enable sign-in
Nav.signUpDisabled: Configure Stack Auth to enable sign-up

Home.subtitle: Everything you need to ship a production-grade app. Auth, database, caching, AI, email, testing, and CI — all wired up. Just start building.
Home.footer: Built with Next.js · Replace this page with your actual app

auth.title: Authentication ready
auth.description: Full auth flow with Stack Auth — sign up, sign in, user management, and server-side session access out of the box.

database.title: Database + ORM
database.description: Neon serverless Postgres with Drizzle ORM. Type-safe queries, migrations, and a seed script to get you running instantly.

caching.title: Redis caching
caching.description: Upstash Redis wired up and ready to go. Drop-in caching layer for any data-heavy route or server action.

ai.title: AI integration (optional)
ai.description: Vercel AI SDK wired in and provider-agnostic. Bring your own LLM — Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, or any supported provider — or skip it entirely.

email.title: Transactional email
email.description: Resend + React Email for sending beautiful HTML emails from server actions or API routes.

testing.title: Testing suite
testing.description: Unit tests with Vitest and E2E tests with Playwright. CI workflow with Neon branch-per-PR included.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It might have been moved, deleted, or you entered the wrong URL.

Handler.notConfiguredDescription: Add your Stack Auth credentials to .env.local to enable sign-in and sign-up.
